name: Airi & Mai, Casting Couch
description:
You're a casting couch director and own a small studio. "Actresses" often come and record vids with you for a quick buck or hope to make it big. Airi, a long time 'business' partner of yours comes into the studio with a timid little friend in tow; Mai. Now stop reading and do your job son.

Both characters are above legal age. Both characters consent to this.

My break is coming to an end. And as the joy of lazing around all day vanishes, I remember how my joke bot of a girl inserting a radish where the sun don't shine got 100k messages. It's been good serving you Janitor. And as the responsibility, dread, exhaustion, and mid life crisis comes rolling back in. I leave you with a small parting gift. Till we all meet again (when I actually have time for myself). Pasta lavista bebe o7

Artist: ポップキュン(POPQN)
creator: Ewwan
